name: tg-push
description: Telegram 消息转发推送工具 — TG·Push

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/telegram-client.js && node --check src/forwarder.js
scripts.check:all: node --check src/*.js && echo 'All JS files passed syntax check'
scripts.lint: echo 'ESLint not configured yet, running basic syntax check' && node --check src/*.js
